metadata.description: Name of the Azure OpenAI chat completions deployment used for server-side LLM calls (e.g. persona inference).
The name of the container image
The region for Azure Speech Service (same as AI Services)
Azure Storage Account name for transcriptions
Azure Storage Blob endpoint for transcriptions
Azure Storage container name for transcripts
Enable Native MAF SDK for local orchestrator
MAF / AI Foundry project endpoint for native SDK
Model name used by native MAF agents
Resource ID of the subnet to use for Container Apps VNet integration. When empty, the environment is created without VNet integration.
Entra ID application (client) id for the Microsoft Teams bot. Leave empty to disable the Teams bridge.
Client secret for the Microsoft Teams bot Entra ID application. Required when microsoftAppId is set.
Tenant kind for the Microsoft Teams bot app registration (MultiTenant recommended for Teams).
Entra ID tenant id for the Teams bot app. Required when microsoftAppType is SingleTenant or UserAssignedMSI.
Application Insights connection string. When non-empty, injected as APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING so the Python bot + orchestrator can push telemetry events.
Foundry prompt agent name the Teams bot fronts. Defaults to TripPlannerAgent; set to FlightBookingAgent, OrchestratorAgent, etc. to change routing without redeploying code.
Optional welcome message the bot sends when a user first opens the chat. Leave empty to use the built-in TripPlanner default.

variables.teamsBotEnv: [if(empty(parameters('microsoftAppId')), createArray(), concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'MICROSOFT_APP_ID', 'value', parameters('microsoftAppId')), createObject('name', 'MICROSOFT_APP_TYPE', 'value', parameters('microsoftAppType')), createObject('name', 'TEAMS_BOT_SPECIALIST_AGENT', 'value', parameters('teamsBotSpecialistAgent'))), if(empty(parameters('microsoftAppPassword')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'MICROSOFT_APP_PASSWORD', 'secretRef', 'microsoft-app-password'))), if(empty(parameters('microsoftAppTenantId')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'MICROSOFT_APP_TENANT_ID', 'value', parameters('microsoftAppTenantId')))), if(empty(parameters('teamsBotWelcomeMessage')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'TEAMS_BOT_WELCOME_MESSAGE', 'value', parameters('teamsBotWelcomeMessage'))))))]

containers.name: main
containers.env: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'AZURE_VOICE_LIVE_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('aiServicesEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_USER_ASSIGNED_IDENTITY_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('identityClientId')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', parameters('identityClientId')), createObject('name', 'VOICE_LIVE_MODEL', 'value', parameters('modelDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'ACS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'secretRef', 'acs-connection-string'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SPEECH_REGION', 'value', parameters('speechRegion')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_SPEECH_RESOURCE_ID', 'value', parameters('aiServicesResourceId')), createObject('name', 'DEBUG_MODE', 'value', 'true'), createObject('name', 'AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT_NAME', 'value', parameters('storageAccountName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_STORAGE_BLOB_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('storageBlobEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_TRANSCRIPTS_CONTAINER', 'value', parameters('transcriptsContainerName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('aiServicesEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_OPENAI_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT', 'value', parameters('chatDeploymentName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_DOCUMENT_INTELLIGENCE_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('aiServicesEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'TRAVEL_ORCHESTRATOR_MODE', 'value', parameters('travelOrchestratorMode')), createObject('name', 'MAF_NATIVE_SDK_ENABLED', 'value', parameters('mafNativeSdkEnabled')), createObject('name', 'MAF_PROJECT_ENDPOINT', 'value', parameters('mafProjectEndpoint')), createObject('name', 'MAF_MODEL', 'value', parameters('mafModel'))), variables('teamsBotEnv'), if(empty(parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING', 'value', parameters('appInsightsConnectionString')))))]
